title: centaurea drabifolia
intro: Centaurea drabifolia, also known as mountain centaury, is a perennial flowering plant belonging to the family Asteraceae. Its roots and leaves are used in traditional medicine, particularly for their anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating respiratory problems. Centaurea drabifolia can be used in herbal preparations like teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
